title: phyllanthus proctoris
intro: Phyllanthus proctoris, also known as Guyanese gooseberry or West Indian gooseberry, is a type of plant species within the family Phyllanthaceae. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus proctoris include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
